name: Offerpad Solutions Inc. Class A Common Stock
summary: Offerpad Solutions Inc. operates an iBuying platform for residential real estate, offering consumers an easier way to buy and sell homes, and is headquartered in Chandler, Arizona. The company uses technology and data analytics to make cash offers on homes, renovate them, and then resell them. Offerpad aims to streamline the real estate transaction process and provide a more convenient experience for buyers and sellers.
